titleStmt.title: SII 22.411: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 411. (A.R. No. 411 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚIVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL RĀJARĀJA I—28th YEAR (A.D. 1012-13)

summary.p: This is in Vaṭṭeḻuttu characters. It is damaged. It begins with the usual introduction Tirumagaḷpōla, etc. This records a tax-free gift of land at Kūḍalūr in Murappu-nāḍu to the temple of Teṉ-Tirumāliruñjōlai Emberumāṉ on the north bank of the river Taṇporunam (Tāmraparṇi), after purchasing the same, by Kaiyānāyakaṉ Nāraṇamasūrā (?) of Nechchura-nāḍu, a division of Rājarājamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa
ḷi veṅkai nāṭum kaṅkapāṭi nuḷampāṭiyum taṭiyapāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum
ṭicai pukaḻtara viḻamaṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟ
ḻil vaḷarūḻi Ellāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrī korāja Irā
śrī rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu Irāja Irājamaṇṭalattu neccuranāṭṭu mel
Iraiyk kuñciraimallaril kaiyānāyakaṉ nāraṇamacūrā (?) Im maṇṭalattu murappunāṭṭu kūṭalū
ṭu nāṉ vilaikku koṇṭu taṇporunattiṉ vaṭakarait teṉtirumāliruñ colai Emperumāṉukku
pūmi Āvatu kiḻellai marutamoṭaikālukku meṟ(k)kum teṉṉellai Ūṟṟu Il niṉṟu kiḻakku
mel Ellai peruṅkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai peruṅkālukkum maṟṟumerik kālukkum teṟ(k)ku
viḷākattil lākamu kālukkum nāṉ Iṟaiili koṇṭapaṭi
ṇamacūrāveṉ teṉtirumāliruñcolai Emperumāṉukku Ippūmiyi ṇṭi nāṭṭu
ṉeḻuttu . murappunāṭṭu kūṭalūr Eḻu-vaṉaraṅkaṉeḻuttu murappunāṭṭu kūṭalūr Araiyaṉ teyattiṉ Eḻuttu . murappunā
ṭṭu kūṭalūr centil viraṉnāṉa keraḷattuṅkap pallavaraiya ṉeḻuttu murappu nāṭṭu kūṭalūr Eṉpāṉeḻuttu murappu nāṭṭu
kūṭalūr taraṇikoṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 22.411 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
